chunks.title: Chunk 1: Introduction
chunks.content: This is the introduction to our guideline.

chunks.title: Chunk 2: Decision - If/Then
chunks.content: If you are eligible, then proceed with the application.

chunks.title: Chunk 3: Threshold - Age
chunks.content: You must be at least 18 years old to apply.

chunks.title: Chunk 4: Flow - Application Process
chunks.content: Please fill out the application form and submit it.

chunks.title: Chunk 5: Criteria - Education
chunks.content: You must have a high school diploma or equivalent to apply.
